1098-t:box1.label: Payments received for tuition
1098-t:box1.so: Tani waa wadarta lacagta dugsiga (tuition) ee la bixiyay sanadkan, taasoo kor u qaadi karta in lagu helo credit-ka canshuurta waxbarashada.
1098-t:box1.en: This is the total tuition money paid this year, which may qualify for an education tax credit.

1098-t:box4.label: Adjustments for a prior year
1098-t:box4.so: Tani waa saxitaan lagu sameeyay lacagta dugsiga ee sannadkii hore, taasoo bedeli karta credit-ka canshuurta ee aad horay u sheegtay.
1098-t:box4.en: This is an adjustment to tuition payments from a prior year, which may change an education credit you already claimed.

1098-t:box5.label: Scholarships or grants
1098-t:box5.so: Tani waa wadarta deeq-waxbarashada (scholarships) ama kaalmada (grants) ee ardaygu helay sanadkan, taasoo dhimi karta lacagta credit-ka canshuurta la helayo.
1098-t:box5.en: This is the total scholarship or grant money the student received this year, which can reduce how much education tax credit you can claim.

1098-t:box6.label: Scholarship adjustments for a prior year
1098-t:box6.so: Tani waa saxitaan lagu sameeyay deeq-waxbarasho sannadkii hore.
1098-t:box6.en: This is an adjustment to scholarships or grants reported in a prior year.

1098-t:box789.label: Enrollment status
1098-t:box789.so: Sanduuqyadani waxay tilmaamayaan haddii ardaygu yahay arday wakhti-buuxa ah ugu yaraan, ama arday heer-koris ah.
1098-t:box789.en: These checkboxes flag whether the student was at least half-time, and whether they're a graduate student.

1098-t:box10.label: Insurance reimbursement
1098-t:box10.so: Tani waa lacag aad ka heshay caymiska dugsiga oo lagu celiyay kharashka waxbarashada.
1098-t:box10.en: This is a refund or reimbursement of tuition expenses from an insurance contract.
